_comment: TEMPLATE: copy to _local/branding/branding.json (gitignored) and replace every <placeholder>. This is your agency identity for all branded audit outputs (docx/pdf covers, content-page headers/footers, and xlsx banners). Schema + layout rules: tools/amazon-ad-audit/BRANDING.md. Without this file the renderers fall back to a built-in Claude- or Codex-style example depending on the agent running.
agency_name: <Your Agency Name: appears in bylines, headers, and workbook banners>
prepared_by_default: <Default 'prepared by' person, e.g. Jane Doe, Founder>

palette_doc._comment: Document palette (hex, no #): ink=body text, cloud=light panels, accent=rules/eyebrows/KPI top-border, mistline=hairlines, steel=secondary text, mist=muted text, cover_bg/cover_slate=dark cover, white.

palette_xlsx._comment: Workbook palette (keys must stay as-is; they map to header fills, banner fill, accents).

fonts.doc_font_name: <font family used in docx/pdf, e.g. Inter>
fonts.doc_font_file: <variable-font filename inside the brand assets dir, e.g. Inter-Variable.ttf>

assets._comment: brand_dir empty = tools/amazon-ad-audit/brand/ (gitignored). Filenames are relative to brand_dir.
